identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a top 1% dark mode fintech dashboard for Brazilian accountants.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Fintech precision with SaaS usability.
Emotion First: Trust, Accuracy, and Efficiency.
Content is King: Data readability is paramount.
Zoom In: Focus on the transaction details.
Negative Space: Use it to separate complex data tables.

visual_enhancers: 1px borders with low opacity for structure

Card.style: rounded-xl bg-[#13141F] border border-white/5 shadow-sm hover:border-indigo-500/20 transition-colors duration-300
Card.usage: Use for stats, forms, and summary sections.

Table.usage: Use 'dense' padding for transaction lists. Font-mono for numbers.

Button.primary: h-10 px-6 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white font-medium hover:bg-indigo-500 transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(99,102,241,0.2)]
Button.secondary: h-10 px-6 rounded-lg bg-white/5 text-white font-medium hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 transition-all
Button.ghost: h-10 px-4 rounded-lg text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all

Input.style: h-10 rounded-lg bg-[#0B0C15] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all

Badge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' and 'recharts' if not present.
2. FONTS: Add 'Outfit' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.
3. THEME: Force DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless requested.
4. LAYOUT: Create a persistent SidebarLayout component.
5. PAGES: Implement Dashboard, Companies, Chart of Accounts, Processing Workflow, History.
6. TABLES: This is a data-heavy app. Ensure tables are dense, sortable, and have pagination.
7. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components. Validate all inputs (CNPJ, Dates).
8. FEEDBACK: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on all actions (success/error).
9. MOCK DATA: Create realistic mock data for bank statements and companies to populate the UI.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
